impact: This advances the PP&D guardrail plan by adding fixture-only validation for the solar permit workflow without live DevHub automation, uploads, payments, or private artifacts.
summary: Add deterministic solar permit guardrail fixture tests and fixture data for missing facts, document groups, and guarded stop points.
target_task: Task checkbox-75: Add guardrail compiler fixture tests for the solar permit workflow covering missing facts, required document groups, payment stop points, correction-upload stop points, and inspection-scheduling stop points.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
